title: Epic Aquatics [RELEASE]
description: This mod aims to improve aquatic life in our favorite block game. I spent countless hours working on it so a download would be appreciated!
body:
Epic Aquatics is a mod that aims to improve aquatic life in your world. Currently, few hostile mobs are added so it is a nice relaxing mod to play! New creatures can spawn in a bunch of locations! Can you find them all?  
Again, this mod took countless hours of work so a download would be greatly appreciated!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6CUq4zdEIT8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Some Features
-------------------
-Added Pyrosome

-Added Snailfish

-Added Clam

-Added three jellyfish - Small Jellyfish, Giant Jellyfish, Deepstaria

-Added Pyura Chilensis 

-Added Siphonophore



Confirmed features
---------------------------------------
-Alligator Gars will make their way into epic aquatics!

-Paddlefish will soon swim in the rivers

-New Tully species will soon be added!

-Snaggletooth Snakes eels may come!

-Radiodonts

Why would you want this mod?
-------------------------------------
Epic aquatics offers many new and unique water entities for your game, some of which drop food items which are quite useful if you want more foods! Another reason you would want this mod is to collect all the creatures in order to add them to your very own aquarium! (You can lead them)  

Woah, look, it's a message telling you to keep your eyes peeled for updates!
